title: action_event.v1
description: The one Airlock event schema (PLAN.md 6.3, SPEC section 7). Emitted for every guarded call — deny at decision time, auto/gate at terminal state — and written durably as a hash-chained audit_events row (event_type='action_event'). Enum value lists are generated from airlock.types (the single vocabulary source) and CI-asserted against it. Versioning: adding optional fields does not bump the version; consumers ignore unknown fields; any rename/type/semantic change is action_event.v2, and these v1 fixtures stay green forever.

event_id.description: Unique id for this event emission (uuid4 hex in the Python SDK).

emitted_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC with microsecond precision and a Z suffix — the airlock-canon-1 timestamp convention (/contracts/canonical-json.md). Also the hashed created_at of the audit row carrying this event.

run_id.description: The guarded invocation this event describes (SDK-minted; joins paused_runs.run_id from P2.3 on).

idempotency_key.description: The ledger key of the action (/contracts/idempotency.md). Never transits the hosted control plane (PLAN.md 6.1) — this event lives in the customer's audit_events only.

cost.description: Money or null — never a JSON float, anywhere (PLAN.md 3.2).

blast_radius_estimate.description: airlock.types.BlastRadius (ordered low < medium < high) or null when unclassified.

guarantee.description: airlock.types.Guarantee (ADR-2). 'none' means the action ran at-most-once.

human_decision.description: airlock.types.HumanDecision or null when no human was involved (auto/deny; always null until the P2.3 approval flow).

decision_latency_ms.description: Control-plane-computed from its own clock pair, recorded verbatim (PLAN.md 6.2); null until P2.3+.

decided_by.description: Opaque actor id (usr_...), NEVER an email (PLAN.md 10.6); null until P2.3+.

action_diff.description: RESERVED for the edit-before-approve preference-learning signal (SPEC section 7). Always null in v1; a non-null shape is an action_event.v2 change.

outcome.description: airlock.types.ActionOutcome: the four terminal ledger states plus 'denied' (a policy block that never reached the ledger).

amount.description: Canonical decimal string (airlock.decimal_string): plain fixed-point, no trailing fractional zeros, zero is '0'. Never a JSON number.

ran.description: Whether a post-verify probe executed for this call.
